text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hm, this is cheap. And meat can go in the
freezer, so I could stock up now...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
This other store has pretty good bargains, too.
Plus they only advertise their sales on their
website, so that means less shoppers to compete
with...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, where should I go... Maybe I should decide
what to cook first.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Actually, everyone said they enjoyed the curry I
made the other day, so let's start there...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...All right, that's the plan settled! This shopping
trip is going to go great!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ack, how is it this late already?! Oh man, I got
carried away...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Ines Fujin has been staying up late
recently...
